transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Panda Express with me? I'm down. I'm just gonna get the bowl. We're gonna do double grilled chicken teriyaki and then a large diet coke. Wait, and you're losing weight eating like that? Yeah, I've been able to lose 20 pounds and I still eat out whenever I want. Nice, who's your coach? Seth G changed the game for me. Man, I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption:
Comment “FASTFOOD” for my fast food cheat sheet

Panda Express: Bowl: Super Greens + Double Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Large Diet Coke (760 calories 73 G protein)

Saves you over a 1,000 calories and helps you stay on track with your fitness journey
ocr_text: 1910 CALORIES 53 G PROTEIN 760 CALORIES 73 G PROTEIN
visual_scenes: Two shirtless men in studio with Panda Express branding and bookshelf backdrop. Comparing standard Panda Express order (1910 cal) vs swap (760 cal). Profile card CTA at end.
creator: @sethgolie

parsed.swap_meal: Bowl with Super Greens + Double Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Large Diet Coke
parsed.notes: Single restaurant swap. Saves 1150 calories. 760 cal, 73g protein. High protein option.
